items.name: Monkey Shoulder Blended Malt Scotch Whisky
items.description: Triple malt Scotch, smooth enough to drink neat but made for cocktails. 700ml is the standard bottle; 1L also available.
items.notes: Price is approximate (~$55–65) — check Dan Murphy's directly for current price. Any Perth Dan Murphy's or BWS will stock this.

items.name: Moment 1.33x Anamorphic Lens + Pixel 9 Pro Case
items.description: Clip-on anamorphic lens giving a 2.4:1 cinematic widescreen ratio with horizontal lens flares. The Moment case for Pixel 9 Pro has a built-in drop-in mount so the lens sits perfectly centred — much more reliable than a universal clip. Gold or blue flare options.

retailers.name: Moment ANZ — Pixel 9 Pro Case (required for lens mount)

items.lead_time: Ships from Moment ANZ — typically 3–7 days to Perth
items.notes: ~$250 for the lens + ~$70 for the Pixel 9 Pro case = ~$320 total. The case is necessary — Moment moved away from universal clips for newer Pixels. Sirui is the other high-quality alternative worth comparing.

items.name: Magnetic Levitating Globe with LED Light
items.description: Floating, self-rotating illuminated globe on an electromagnetic base. Good desk toy. Aim for a larger base model (20cm+ globe) over the cheap 8cm ones — the bigger ones look substantially better.
items.lead_time: In stock online; Big W Perth stores likely stock these
items.notes: Prices vary by size/quality ($50–150). Check Big W first for easy in-person purchase. Avoid the tiny 8cm ones, they're underwhelming.
